title: BootNotificationResponse
description: Server response to a BootNotificationRequest, indicating acceptance, rejection, or pending status along with operational parameters.

status.description: Result of the boot notification registration.

serverTime.description: Server UTC timestamp for station clock synchronization.

heartbeatIntervalSec.description: Interval in seconds at which the station must send heartbeats.

retryInterval.description: Seconds to wait before retrying. Required when status is Rejected or Pending.

configuration.description: Optional key-value configuration pairs pushed to the station.

sessionKey.description: Base64-encoded 32-byte HMAC session key for message authentication.
